```python
oracle_type = int(metadata.get("oracle_type", 0))
expected_bitstring = "00" if oracle_type == 0 else "11"

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots, f"Total counts {total_counts} != shots {shots}"

assert expected_bitstring in counts, f"Expected outcome {expected_bitstring} not found in counts {counts}"
assert counts[expected_bitstring] == shots, (
    f"For oracle_type={oracle_type}, expected all shots to be {expected_bitstring}, got {counts}"
)

unexpected = {k: v for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected_bitstring and v != 0}
assert not unexpected, f"Unexpected measurement outcomes for oracle_type={oracle_type}: {unexpected}"
```
